LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-22-2024 HEARING RE: ASSIGNEE NDS, LLC'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MATTER IS TRANSFERRED TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 501 AT 9:30 A.M. ON FEBRUARY 13, 2024. THAT DEPARTMENT HANDLES ALL REAL PROPERTY CASES PER SF LOCAL RULE 8.10A1. PARTIES TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.7B AND DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR RESPECTIVE FILINGS IN SUPPORT OF AND IN OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION TO DEPARTMENT 501 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE AND DEPARTMENT NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 1, 2024. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 28, 2024 FOR THE MOVING PARTY TO FILE A SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF ADDRESSING: (1) WHETHER THE MOVING PARTY IS SEEKING AN ISSUANCE OF AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: SALE OF DWELLING TO BE SET FOR A LATER DATE OR IS SEEKING AN ORDER AUTHORIZING THE SALE OF DWELLING AT THIS HEARING; (2) TO PROVIDE A FILED ENDORSED COPY OF THE PREVIOUSLY ENTERED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHICH APPEARS TO BE REFERENCED IN THE NOTICE OF HEARING FILED ON NOVEMBER 11, 2023: "NOTICE IS HEREBY GIVEN THAT THE ABOVE ENTITLED COURT HAS SHE THIS MATTER OF AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE.."; AND (3) TO EXPLAIN THE BASIS FOR THE SALE OF THIS PROPERTY IF THE PROPERTY DOES NOT BELONG TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. SEE APPLICATION FOR SALE OF DWELLING PARAGRAPH 6: " THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR DOES NOT APPEAR TO BE THE OWNER OF THE PROPERTY" SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF SHALL NOT EXCEED 2 PAGES, EXCLUDING EXHIBITS AND SHALL BE LIMITED TO THE ISSUES LISTED ABOVE. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: VANESSA WU; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, ASSIGNEE NDS, LLC'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, ETC. IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE A SUBMIT AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR EXECUTION ON FEBRUARY 28, 2024. THE HEARING DATE ON THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SHALL BE MARCH 29, 2024. MOVING PARTY SHALL PERSONALLY SERVE THE ORDER NO LATER THAN MARCH 6, 2024 AND THE PROOF OF SERVICE TO BE FILED NO LATER THAN MARCH 8, 2024. JUDGMENT DEBTOR SHALL FILE A RESPONSE NO LATER THAN MARCH 18, 2024. MOVING PARTY SHALL FILE A REPLY, IF ANY, NO LATER THAN MARCH 22, 2024. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HEARING ON ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: SALE OF DWELLING
Off Calendar Mar-05-2024 Continued To Apr-08-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

Notice Of Hearing On Order To Show Cause, Etc.
Off Calendar Feb-28-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Guan Shao; defendant, appearing in pro per.

Winnie Chan, Court Certified Cantonese Interpreter #785540 is present with an oath on file.

Mr. Shao states that he did not see the court's tentative ruling or give notice to opposing counsel that he would be appearing in court today. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

ASSIGNEE NDS, LLC'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, ETC. is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Moving party to prepare a submit an Order to Show Cause for execution on February 28, 2024. The hearing date on the Order to Show Cause shall be March 29, 2024. Moving party shall personally serve the order no later than March 6, 2024 and the proof of service to be filed no later than March 8, 2024. Judgment debtor shall file a response no later than March 18, 2024. Moving party shall file a reply, if any, no later than March 22, 2024.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On Order To Show Cause, Etc.
Off Calendar Feb-13-2024 Continued To Feb-28-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

ASSIGNEE NDS, LLC. Notice Of Hearing On Order To Show Cause, Etc. is continued to February 28, 2024 for the moving party to file a supplemental brief addressing: (1) whether the moving party is seeking an issuance of an Order to Show Cause Re: Sale of Dwelling to be set for a later date or is seeking an order authorizing the sale of dwelling at this hearing; (2) to provide a filed endorsed copy of the previously entered Order to Show cause which appears to be referenced in the Notice of Hearing filed on November 11, 2023: "Notice is hereby given that the above entitled Court has she this matter of an order to show cause.."; and (3) to explain the basis for the sale of this property if the property does not belong to the judgment debtor. See Application for Sale of Dwelling paragraph 6: " the Judgment Debtor does not appear to be the owner of the Property" Supplemental brief shall not exceed 2 pages, excluding exhibits and shall be limited to the issues listed above. =(501/CFH)

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On Order To Show Cause, Etc.

MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Defendant GUAN SHAO present in pro per;
Senjane "Mimi" Laine present via Zoom videoconference as a Certified Cantonese-language court interpreter (Certification no. 301079) to assist Mr. Shao;

HEARING RE: ASSIGNEE NDS, LLC's Order To Show Cause.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is transferred to be heard in Department 501 at 9:30 a.m. on February 13, 2024. That department handles all real property cases per SF Local Rule 8.10A1. Parties to comply with SFLR 2.7B and deliver courtesy copies of their respective filings in support of and in opposition to the motion to department 501 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date and department no later than February 1, 2024.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
